creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #0)

sys/netpfil/pf/dup:dup_to also gets a udp_input failure . . .

# /usr/bin/kyua test -k /usr/tests/Kyuafile sys/netpfil/pf/dup:dup_to
